subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, mayest thou be ever and eternally occupied with the remembrance of the Most Exalted Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بذکر محبوب متعال مشغول باشی ذکر حق
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
